name: Moon and Me
overview: Pepi Nana is a doll who comes to life whenever the moon comes out (and her owner is asleep). Moon Baby visits them from the moon and, in what some people might deem a rude guest, proceeds to wake the rest of the toy house with an African thumb piano. He then guides them to Storyland for a story and a song.

trailers.title: CBeebies Songs | Moon and Me | Tea Song
